news.title: Köln macht nicht mit: Kein städtisches Public Viewing zur WM – hier können Fans gucken - Express
news.summary:
# Summary

Cologne will not organize official public viewing events for the World Cup, breaking from tradition. Instead of a city-sponsored fan zone, visitors interested in watching matches should look to local restaurants and bars that are independently offering viewing parties. This means fans visiting Cologne during the tournament will need to seek out individual establishments rather than relying on a centralized public viewing location.

news.title: Restaurant Bouchon du Centre stopt na 27 jaar: ‘De mensen ga ik missen, maar Amsterdam niet’ - Het Parool
news.summary:
# Summary

Bouchon du Centre, a French restaurant in Amsterdam's city center, is closing after 27 years of operation. The owner expresses that while they'll miss the regular customers, they won't miss Amsterdam itself. Visitors to Amsterdam should note that this long-established French dining spot will no longer be available.

news.title: Ze werkte voor de bekendste chefs van Antwerpen, nu start Senna (30) het eigenzinnige BOE: “Het lijkt op een theehuis in Hongkong” - GVA
news.summary:
# Summary

Senna, a 30-year-old chef who previously worked for Antwerp's most renowned chefs, has opened her own unique restaurant called BOE, which is designed to resemble a traditional Hong Kong teahouse. This new spot offers visitors an unconventional dining experience that brings Asian aesthetics and culinary style to Antwerp's food scene. Food enthusiasts visiting the city should check it out for its distinctive atmosphere and the chef's expertise gained from working with Antwerp's top culinary talents.
